goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '3 people' and '5 nights' starting from 'saturday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'thursday' and should go to 'birmingham new street'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 17:45'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should have a star of 4
The hotel doesn't need to have free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 3 people and 5 nights starting from saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on thursday and should go to birmingham new street
The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 17:45
Make sure you get departure time
